overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through grassy terrain at night in a video game environment. The camera moves steadily forward revealing a body of water on the left side, with dense bushes lining the right side of the path. The scene is characterized by very low light conditions with minimal ambient illumination.

The path is flanked by tall grass on both sides and dense bushes on the right. As the camera advances, a body of water gradually becomes visible on the left, marking the approach to a shoreline.

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the trail with the water body now prominently visible on the left side. The distant shoreline is visible across the dark water, maintaining the low-light nighttime atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow dirt trail that transitions from a secluded grassy path into an open shoreline at night. It begins with a steady walk through rolling hills, where the path is tightly flanked by tall grass and dense bushes on the right. As the camera advances, the terrain gradually opens up to reveal a body of water emerging on the left side. The scene then shifts as the water becomes a prominent feature of the landscape, while the bushes on the right draw closer to the trail. Finally, the camera continues forward under minimal ambient light, keeping the dirt path centered as the distant shoreline becomes visible across the dark water.
